narrative:
04 Ohio Senate district has 231,423 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.1% D−R vs -23.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
